texto: When I was 16, I felt very relieved to discover cinema. It was like an island where I could see life and death from another perspective. Every young person should be interested in that island. It's a beautiful place.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Leos Carax: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “When I was 16, I felt very relieved to discover cinema. It was like an island where I could see l…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que vida, beautiful, perspective pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de luto e beautiful.
